# Lunar Pulse

> A live lunation clock: the Moon's zodiacal position, lunar phase, and the
> positions of the Sun and Moon on the tropical zodiac, computed in the
> browser to the arcminute, every second. Verified against Swiss Ephemeris
> (max deviation 0.069 arcminutes).

## Pages

- [The clock](https://lunarpulse.ai/): the living lunation clock, with the
  current Moon sign, degree, arcminute, and phase stated in the page text.
- [The Clairsentient Support Circle](https://lunarpulse.ai/circle/): a
  member circle whose record ties lived experience to exact lunar position.
- [The Gathering](https://lunarpulse.ai/gathering/): the monthly circle
  meeting, announced under its sky.
